name: precision: sentences whose subject is an external actor are not agent work-claims
note: From the 400-issue dogfood report. 'Chrome has actively disabled GPU acceleration' is the agent describing the world, not reporting work done. Subject is Chrome, not the agent.
claim: Chrome has actively disabled GPU acceleration for the renderer process. GitHub enforces this by making you push to another branch first. The dashboard server is still running at http://localhost:8765/report.html.
